Quelles sont leurs cons\u00e9quences ?\nActions (30 min) : choix d\u2019une action individuelle et une action collective pour tendre vers une alimentation plus durable et anticipation des difficult\u00e9s/freins qui pourraient \u00eatre rencontr\u00e9s\nD\u00e9brief (15 min) : retours sur l\u2019atelier, derniers conseils, quelle suite donner \u00e0 l\u2019atelier, ...\nCroyez-nous, \u00e7a passe (tr\u00e8s) vite !\nInfos pratiques\nMat\u00e9riel\nVous n'avez besoin de rien ! :)\nVous voulez organiser un atelier pour votre structure?\nhttps://forms.gle/ZhiyKGgcQmMYQxMt7\n  Contacts\nSite internet : http://fresquealimentation.org\nPage LinkedIn\nPage Facebook\n  A bient\u00f4t ;)",

Voici des questions auxquelles vous serez en mesure de r\u00e9pondre apr\u00e8s l\u2019atelier.\n  La Fresque permet aussi de prendre conscience de notre consommation de ressources au quotidien \u00e0 travers le prisme des d\u00e9chets tout en sensibilisant sur les bonnes pratiques de tri et de pr\u00e9vention.\n  Elle permet enfin de r\u00e9fl\u00e9chir sur les pratiques de r\u00e9duction des d\u00e9chets et de d\u00e9couvrir des alternatives z\u00e9ro d\u00e9chet, z\u00e9ro gaspillage.\n  Une partie du jeu consiste \u00e0 prendre connaissance des cartes collectivement, puis \u00e0 les disposer par liens pour cr\u00e9er une fresque. Une seconde partie de d\u00e9brief et d\u2019\u00e9changes suivra.\n  N'attendez pas et venez tester l'atelier \u00e0 la date & heure inscrite plus haut !\n  Cet atelier se tiendra en ligne par visioconf\u00e9rence et nous utiliserons un outil web de collaboration visuelle.     "description": "The Circular Economy Collage will give you a clearer understanding of the issues related to our use of natural resources and to the waste we generate.\n  Which resources do we consume the most and which are most under pressure? What impacts do our consumption and waste generation have on those resources and on the planet in general?\nHow can I contribute to reducing those impacts in my daily life? How can companies evolve their business models?\nTo discover the answers to these and many other questions, come and take part in a workshop of the Circular Economy Collage. The workshop covers topics such as climate change, biodiversity loss, resource scarcity and pollution generated by human activities and enables you to identify concrete courses of action!\nAbout the workshop\nThe Circular Economy Collage is a stimulating, group-based workshop founded on scientific information, which enables participants to grasp the limits of our existing global \u201clinear\u201d economy and understand the opportunities offered by the circular economy. Inspired by the Climate Fresk, the workshop will allow you to understand the issues surrounding our use of natural resources and our generation and treatment of waste as well as other impacts caused by human activities. The workshop lasts 3 hours and takes place in groups of 6/7 people with 1 facilitator.\nThe Circular Economy Collage workshops are aimed at the general public, and are open to all, whatever your level of knowledge on these subjects. The Collage is also relevant for other audiences such as companies, communities and schools.  For our public workshops, participation is limited to 1 participant per organisation. If several members of your organisation wish to take part, please contact us to organise a dedicated session.\nBenefits of the workshop\nHaving deepened your understanding of the limits of the linear production-consumption-waste system, you will discover a more virtuous model for our economy and lots of ways that each of us can save natural resources and produce less waste. You will leave the workshop more aware, better-informed and motivated to take action to \"circularise\" our system!",
    "scrape_date": "2026-05-15T11:26:44.617475+02:00"

Inspired by the Climate Fresk, the workshop will allow you to understand the issues surrounding our use of natural resources and our generation and treatment of waste as well as other impacts caused by human activities. The workshop lasts 3 hours and takes place in groups of 6/7 people with 1 facilitator.\nThe Circular Economy Collage workshops are aimed at the general public, and are open to all, whatever your level of knowledge on these subjects. The Collage is also relevant for other audiences such as companies, communities and schools.  For our public workshops, participation is limited to 1 participant per organisation. If several members of your organisation wish to take part, please contact us to organise a dedicated session.\nBenefits of the workshop\nHaving deepened your understanding of the limits of the linear production-consumption-waste system, you will discover a more virtuous model for our economy and lots of ways that each of us can save natural resources and produce less waste. You will leave the workshop more aware, better-informed and motivated to take action to \"circularise\" our system!",

    "description": "The Circular Economy Collage will give you a clearer understanding of the issues related to our use of natural resources and to the waste we generate.\n  Which resources do we consume the most and which are most under pressure? What impacts do our consumption and waste generation have on those resources and on the planet in general?\nHow can I contribute to reducing those impacts in my daily life? How can companies evolve their business models?\nTo discover the answers to these and many other questions, come and take part in a workshop of the Circular Economy Collage. The workshop covers topics such as climate change, biodiversity loss, resource scarcity and pollution generated by human activities and enables you to identify concrete courses of action!\nAbout the workshop\nThe Circular Economy Collage is a stimulating, group-based workshop founded on scientific information, which enables participants to grasp the limits of our existing global \u201clinear\u201d economy and understand the opportunities offered by the circular economy. Inspired by the Climate Fresk, the workshop will allow you to understand the issues surrounding our use of natural resources and our generation and treatment of waste as well as other impacts caused by human activities. The workshop lasts 3 hours and takes place in groups of 6/7 people with 1 facilitator.\nThe Circular Economy Collage workshops are aimed at the general public, and are open to all, whatever your level of knowledge on these subjects. The Collage is also relevant for other audiences such as companies, communities and schools.  For our public workshops, participation is limited to 1 participant per organisation. If several members of your organisation wish to take part, please contact us to organise a dedicated session.\nBenefits of the workshop\nHaving deepened your understanding of the limits of the linear production-consumption-waste system, you will discover a more virtuous model for our economy and lots of ways that each of us can save natural resources and produce less waste. You will leave the workshop more aware, better-informed and motivated to take action to \"circularise\" our system!",

The Collage is also relevant for other audiences such as companies, communities and schools.  For our public workshops, participation is limited to 1 participant per organisation. If several members of your organisation wish to take part, please contact us to organise a dedicated session.\nBenefits of the workshop\nHaving deepened your understanding of the limits of the linear production-consumption-waste system, you will discover a more virtuous model for our economy and lots of ways that each of us can save natural resources and produce less waste. You will leave the workshop more aware, better-informed and motivated to take action to \"circularise\" our system!",

    "description": "This is a fun and educational workshop to help and motivate people to take action for the climate !2tonnes workshop in English with the World versionNo PRM accessYou are convinced of the climate emergency, but you don't know what to do or where to start? Individual or collective actions? Becoming a flexitarian or buying second-hand? Renovating your home or cycling to work ? Getting involved in an association or in your workplace?You always dreamed about taking a step back and imagine a world scenario for a low carbon transition scenario ? What if you could take actions, not only individually, but at a global level, implicating every countries and major companies ? Would you achieve to reach the goals of the Paris Agreement for Climate ?This workshop is made for you if you want to understand in a concrete and playful way what it takes for our society to become carbon neutral in 2050. With other participants, you will form a team whose mission is to build a transition scenario to limit climate change to +1.5\u00b0C. To do so, you will choose both individual AND collective actions to take in the next 30 years and see thanks to our live simulation after each round of decisions what are the impacts of your choices and how your transition scenario progresses towards the 2050 goal.At the end of the workshop, you will have an overview of what a transition to net zero means in terms of actions to prioritize at different scales, which actors and sectors will be impacted.Thanks to your participant account, you will discover the diversity of possible actions and the magnitude of their impact.***Practical information***Make sure to take 10-20 min the day before the workshop to complete your personal carbon footprint. The experience is much more fun and powerful if you play with your actual data !If you haven\u2019t received any email 48H before the event, please check your spam and look for an email with \u201c2 tonnes\u201d in the object. If you find none, reach out to us at contact@2tonnes.org and we will connect you with the facilitator of your session.Come with a smile on your face and the motivation to take actions for a carbon neutral world.",

Il s'anime sous la forme d'un atelier de 3h, gr\u00e2ce \u00e0 un animateur/animatrice qui conduit l'atelier, facilite les \u00e9changes, et manipule la plateforme web qui permet la simulation.\ud83d\udcd1Conditions d\u2019utilisation :Une fois form\u00e9, vous pourrez animer pour vos proche, le grand public (ateliers ouverts \u00e0 tous, en dehors du cadre professionnel) et vos coll\u00e8gues (dans la m\u00eame organisation que vous)Les droits d\u2019utilisation sont gratuits ou payants selon le contexte :Aupr\u00e8s de vos coll\u00e8gues, le co\u00fbt est de 20\u20acHT/participant ou 5\u20acHT/participant dans le secteur public.Aupr\u00e8s de vos proches, du grand public, d\u2019\u00e9tudiants ou coll\u00e8gues enseignant, c\u2019est gratuit.\ud83d\udca1 Contenu de la formation\ud83c\uddf2\ud83c\uddeb Vous serez form\u00e9s \u00e0 la version France de 2tonnes (le jeu avec les donn\u00e9es fran\u00e7aises).De ma\u00eetriser le d\u00e9roul\u00e9 d'un atelierD'\u00eatre capable d'animer le serious gameDe savoir manipuler la plateforme web\ud83d\udca1 Format de la formationCe parcours de formation se d\u00e9compose en plusieurs \u00e9tapes. Le tarif de 50\u20ac comprend l'inscription pour tout le parcours de formation, et le droit d'utilisation \u00e0 titre b\u00e9n\u00e9vole ou aupr\u00e8s de ses coll\u00e8gues.1. Formation autonome (Entre 30min et 1h30)Cette \u00e9tape se d\u00e9roule en ligne. Sous forme de petites vid\u00e9os, activit\u00e9s, quiz, elle vous permettra d'acqu\u00e9rir les bases n\u00e9cessaires \u00e0 l'organisation et \u00e0 l'animation d'un atelier, et d'acc\u00e9der et utiliser la plateforme 2tonnes. Beaucoup de parties sont facultatives et chacun/chacune peut aller \u00e0 son rythme !2. Formation accompagn\u00e9e (3h)Il s'agit de la session de 3h avec un formateur/formatrice (c'est pour cette session qu'il faut choisir la date en vous inscrivant). Elle vous permettra d'aborder dans le d\u00e9tail l'animation et la posture d'animateur/animatrice, et d'avoir un maximum de retours d'exp\u00e9riences et de conseils personnalis\u00e9s.3. Animation (3h)Chez 2tonnes, nous consid\u00e9rons que vous n'\u00eates pas r\u00e9ellement animateur/animatrice si vous n'\u00eates pas pass\u00e9 \u00e0 l'action ! Nous vous inciterons et pourrons m\u00eame vous accompagner pour votre premi\u00e8re animation, coanimation ou observation.4. D\u00e9brief (1h)Il s'agit d'une s\u00e9ance en ligne de 1h, anim\u00e9e par un formateur/formatrice. Tous les n\u00e9oanimateurs/animatrices sont les bienvenus pour partager leurs retours d'exp\u00e9riences et poser leurs derni\u00e8res questions. Ces sessions sont organis\u00e9es r\u00e9guli\u00e8rement et vous aurez les informations pratiques pour vous inscrire (gratuit) plus tard durant le parcours.\ud83d\udca1 Et apr\u00e8s la formation ?\ud83d\udcda Suite \u00e0 la formation, vous aurez acc\u00e8s \u00e0 des ressources pour continuer \u00e0 se former sur le simulateur, l'animation et le contenu. Vous pourrez ensuite rejoindre la communaut\u00e9 des animateurs/animatrices !Vous aurez aussi de nombreuses opportunit\u00e9s d'animer ou de vous former.Vous pourrez disposer des droits d'utilisation des outils dans divers cadres, mais les droits commerciaux et la vente de l'atelier ne sont pas autoris\u00e9s suite \u00e0 cette formation.
